landmarks.name: Eiffel Tower
landmarks.description: The Eiffel Tower is a wrought-iron lattice tower on the Champ de Mars in Paris, France.
landmarks.cultural_context: It is named after the engineer Gustave Eiffel, whose company designed and built the tower.

landmarks.name: Statue of Liberty
landmarks.description: The Statue of Liberty is a colossal neoclassical sculpture on Liberty Island in New York Harbor.
landmarks.cultural_context: A gift from the people of France to the people of the United States.
